p.c: function[T0](x0: T0) { Multiset.empty[T0].multiplicity(x0) = 0 }[T](x)

goal: exists(k0: FiniteSet[T]) { forall(x0: T) { not k0.contains(x0) implies Multiset.empty[T].multiplicity(x0) = 0 } }

p.c: exists(k0: T) { not k0 ∈ FiniteSet.empty[T] and Multiset.empty[T].multiplicity(k0) != 0 }
let w0: T satisfy { not w0 ∈ FiniteSet.empty[T] and Multiset.empty[T].multiplicity(w0) != 0 }
not w0 ∈ FiniteSet.empty[T]
Multiset.empty[T].multiplicity(w0) != 0
function[T0](x0: T0) { Multiset.empty[T0].multiplicity(x0) = 0 }[T](w0)
exists(k0: FiniteSet[T]) { forall(x0: T) { x0 ∈ k0 or Multiset.empty[T].multiplicity(x0) = 0 } }
let w0: FiniteSet[T] satisfy { forall(x0: T) { x0 ∈ w0 or Multiset.empty[T].multiplicity(x0) = 0 } }
function[T0](x0: Multiset[T0]) { exists(k0: FiniteSet[T0]) { forall(x1: T0) { x1 ∈ k0 or x0.multiplicity(x1) = 0 } } = x0.has_finite_support }[T](Multiset.empty[T])
exists(k0: FiniteSet[T]) { forall(x0: T) { x0 ∈ k0 or Multiset.from_list[T](items).multiplicity(x0) = 0 } }
let w0: FiniteSet[T] satisfy { forall(x0: T) { x0 ∈ w0 or Multiset.from_list[T](items).multiplicity(x0) = 0 } }
function[T0](x0: Multiset[T0]) { exists(k0: FiniteSet[T0]) { forall(x1: T0) { x1 ∈ k0 or x0.multiplicity(x1) = 0 } } = x0.has_finite_support }[T](Multiset.from_list[T](items))
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }(a.multiplicity(x), 1)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { 0 != x0 or x1 + x0 = x1 }(0, a.multiplicity(x))
exists(k0: T) { a.insert(item).multiplicity(k0) != (a + Multiset.singleton(item)).multiplicity(k0) }
let w0: T satisfy { (a + Multiset.singleton(item)).multiplicity(w0) != a.insert(item).multiplicity(w0) }

goal: exists(k0: FiniteSet[T]) { forall(x0: T) { not k0.contains(x0) implies a.multiplicity(x0) = 0 } }

p.c: function[T0](x0: Multiset[T0]) { exists(k0: FiniteSet[T0]) { forall(x1: T0) { x1 ∈ k0 or x0.multiplicity(x1) = 0 } } = x0.has_finite_support }[T](a)

goal: exists(k0: FiniteSet[T]) { forall(x0: T) { not k0.contains(x0) implies b.multiplicity(x0) = 0 } }

p.c: function[T0](x0: Multiset[T0]) { exists(k0: FiniteSet[T0]) { forall(x1: T0) { x1 ∈ k0 or x0.multiplicity(x1) = 0 } } = x0.has_finite_support }[T](b)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: FiniteSet[T0]) { FiniteSet.new[T0](x0.underlying_set ∪ x1.underlying_set) = Option.some[FiniteSet[T0]](fs_union[T0](x0, x1)) }[T](support_a, support_b)

function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { Option.some[FiniteSet[T0]](x0) != FiniteSet.new[T0](x1) or x0.underlying_set = x1 }[T](fs_union[T](support_a, support_b), support_a.underlying_set ∪ support_b.underlying_set)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[T](fs_union[T](support_a, support_b), x)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[T](support_a, x)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[T](support_b, x)
function(x0: T) { a.multiplicity(x0) = 0 or x0 ∈ support_a }(x)
function(x0: T) { b.multiplicity(x0) = 0 or x0 ∈ support_b }(x)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { 0 != x0 or x1 + x0 = x1 }(0, 0)

goal: exists(k0: FiniteSet[T]) { forall(x0: T) { not k0.contains(x0) implies (a + b).multiplicity(x0) = 0 } }

p.c: exists(k0: T) { not k0 ∈ fs_union[T](support_a, support_b) and (a + b).multiplicity(k0) != 0 }
let w0: T satisfy { not w0 ∈ fs_union[T](support_a, support_b) and (a + b).multiplicity(w0) != 0 }
not w0 ∈ fs_union[T](support_a, support_b)
(a + b).multiplicity(w0) != 0
function(x0: T) { (a + b).multiplicity(x0) = 0 or x0 ∈ fs_union[T](support_a, support_b) }(w0)
exists(k0: FiniteSet[T]) { forall(x0: T) { x0 ∈ k0 or (a + b).multiplicity(x0) = 0 } }
let w0: FiniteSet[T] satisfy { forall(x0: T) { x0 ∈ w0 or (a + b).multiplicity(x0) = 0 } }
function[T0](x0: Multiset[T0]) { exists(k0: FiniteSet[T0]) { forall(x1: T0) { x1 ∈ k0 or x0.multiplicity(x1) = 0 } } = x0.has_finite_support }[T](a + b)
